productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes White Shirts
description: CompositionWhite shirt with red stripes, made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with brand embroidery, and a curved hemFittingSlimWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on decorationThis easy-to-wear T-shirt from United Colours of Benetton adds a touch of fun and playfulness to your wardrobe. Show off your fun side with this classy piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with interesting denims and semi-formal shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
